title: Brazilian Tagine Delight
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegetarian tagine dish inspired by Brazilian cuisine, featuring chicken as a central element.

ingredients.name: 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breast
ingredients.amount: 2 cups mixed bell peppers (green, red, yellow)

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or clay tagine over medium heat.
Add onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add zucchinis and cook until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add bell peppers, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper; cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, and oregano.
Add the chicken and bring to a simmer.
Cover the tagine and cook for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice.
